title: Team member role chip
description: Colour-coded chip for team_member.role_on_team. Never relies on colour alone — always carries a text label + optional icon.

variant.$expr: ({ player: 'neutral', captain: 'accent', vice_captain: 'info', coach: 'success', assistant_coach: 'success', team_manager: 'info', medical: 'warning', analyst: 'neutral', substitute: 'neutral' })[props.role]

leadingIcon.$expr: props.showIcon ? ({ player: 'user', captain: 'star', vice_captain: 'star', coach: 'academic-cap', assistant_coach: 'academic-cap', team_manager: 'clipboard', medical: 'heart', analyst: 'chart-bar', substitute: 'user' })[props.role] : null

children.$expr: ({ player: 'Player', captain: 'Captain', vice_captain: 'Vice-captain', coach: 'Coach', assistant_coach: 'Asst. Coach', team_manager: 'Manager', medical: 'Medical', analyst: 'Analyst', substitute: 'Substitute' })[props.role]
